name: chr2p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 2 p-arm pericentric flank (2p11.2-2p11.1) — the ancient ape-fusion-side sub-centromeric LCR shoreline. Mixed alpha-satellite (D2Z), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Site of the 2p11 immunoglobulin-kappa locus (IGK) at the proximal edge, immediately distal to centromeric heterochromatin. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat2 patches + Horvath/She pericentromeric SD mosaic on the ape-fusion p-side; immediately distal to IGK.

related_diseases: IGK B-cell V(D)J recombination boundary issues
